title: Karlsten Wasp & Nest Killer Spray | Maximum Strength, Fast-Acting Formula | Kills Wasps, Hornets & Nests Instantly | Long-Lasting Indoor & Outdoor Pest Control | 300ml
bullet_points: Powerful Wasp & Nest Killer.Are unwelcome wasps and hornets buzzing around your property, making you feel unsafe and uncomfortable? Karlsten's high-strength wasp and nest killer provides a fast-acting solution to eliminate these pests and restore peace of mind to your home.

Fast-Acting Formula: This powerful spray delivers a quick knockdown effect, eliminating wasps and hornets on contact. The targeted spray reaches the source of the problem, effectively destroying wasp and hornet nests. Formula is suitable for both indoor and outdoor applications, allowing you to tackle wasp and hornet problems wherever they arise.

Safety and Quality You Can Trust: This product is registered for use in UK homes, ensuring it meets strict safety standards. Karlsten is a well-established brand known for high-quality pest control solutions, offering satisfaction so you can tackle with confidence.

Easy Application: A 10-second burst treats 1 square meter, allowing for efficient application. formula effectively targets wasps and hornets. Don't let wasps and hornets take over your home. Reclaim your outdoor space and enjoy peace of mind.

Our Story: Pests, both indoors and outdoors, can disrupt your peace of mind. Karlsten is your partner in creating a haven from unwanted visitors. We develop a comprehensive range of high-quality, rigorously tested control solutions. Whether it's repelling critters in your garden or eliminating insects in your home, our targeted and broad-spectrum formulas empower you to take control.
